config.MoreAffordableItems.name: More Affordable Items
config.MoreAffordableItems.description: Lower Redux Casino prices from the default ten-times Qi Coin cost to the original one-times cost. Example: 1000 Qi Coins becomes 100 Qi Coins.
config.SpouseRoommateFurnitureAvailabili: Choose when Spouse and Heart Events items appear in the Casino shop.
config.OtherCategoriesAvailability.name: Other Categories
config.OtherCategoriesAvailability.descr: Choose whether all other enabled categories use their normal unlock rules or are always available.
config.IncludeMuseumRewardReplacements.d: Turn Museum Rewards on or off in the Casino shop.
config.IncludeSecretSpecialItems.name: Secret and Special Items
config.IncludeSecretSpecialItems.descrip: Turn Secret and Special Items on or off in the Casino shop.
Turn Spouse and Heart Events on or off in the Casino shop.
config.IncludeDesertFestival.name: Desert Festival
config.IncludeDesertFestival.description: Turn Desert Festival furniture, decor, wallpaper, weapons, trinkets, and clothing on or off in the Casino shop.
config.IncludeCactusSalesmanCactuses.des: Turn Random Cactus Purchase on or off in the Casino shop.
